name: Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange
description: Demonstrates the Diffie-Hellman key exchange protocol: Alice and Bob agree on public parameters (p, g), each choose a secret exponent, exchange public values, and independently compute the same shared secret.
intuition: Alice and Bob mix their private colors into a shared public color, send the mixture to each other, then mix in their private color again — the result is identical without either ever sending their private color.
